  • Uses of PlayerDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI that return types with arguments of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PlayerDTO>
    ClientVirtualView.getDefaultTileOrder()
    Returns the current ordered list of players on the default tile (index = slot position).
    List<PlayerDTO>
    ClientVirtualView.getPlayers()
    Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of all players currently in the game, sorted alphabetically by nickname.
    List<PlayerDTO>
    ClientVirtualView.getWinners()
    Returns the list of winning players.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Adds a player to the existing lobby.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Creates a new game lobby with the given host player.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Joins an already-loaded game session as a reconnecting player.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Load a game if there is one
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.ping(PlayerDTO player)
    Heartbeat signal sent by the client to the server to prove it is still connected.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position)
    Places the given player's totem on the specified offer tile during the placing phase.
    void
    ClientVirtualView.playerAdded(PlayerDTO playerAdded)
    Executes player added.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Signals that the player passes their turn without drawing a card (used when no valid market action is available).
    void
    ClientVirtualView.playerToPlaceChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Executes player to place changed.
    void
    ClientVirtualView.playerToPlayChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Executes player to play changed.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the bottom market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects one extra card from the market, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player)
    Skips the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect without picking any card.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientVirtualView.gameWinners(List<PlayerDTO> playerDTOSWinner)
    Executes game winners.
    void
    ClientVirtualView.orderOnDefaultTile(List<PlayerDTO> orderOnDefaultTile)

  • Uses of PlayerDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket with parameters of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to add the player to the current lobby.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to create a new game.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to join a game that is already being loaded.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to load a saved game to the server.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.ping(PlayerDTO player)
    Sends a heartbeat ping to the server so it knows this client is still alive.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position)
    Sends a placing-player request to the server.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Sends a request indicating the player skips their turn.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the bottom market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the top market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw an extra card and blocks until the server confirms success or sends back an error.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player)
    Sends a skip-extra-draw request: the player declines the bonus draw without selecting any card.

  • Uses of PlayerDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages

    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages with parameters of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AddPlayerMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates a message requesting that the given player join the current lobby.
     
    CreateGameMessage(PlayerDTO playerHostL, int playerNumber)
    Creates a message requesting that a new game be created.
     
    JoinGameLoadedMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates the socket message to join a game that is being loaded.
     
    LoadGameMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates the socket message to initiate loading of a saved game.
     
    PingMessage(PlayerDTO player)
    Creates a ping message for the given player.
     
    PlacingPlayerMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, int position)
    Creates a message requesting that the player be placed at the given tile position.
     
    PlayerDoNothingMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates a message indicating the player skips their turn.
     
    SelectCardFromBottomListMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting a card draw from the bottom market row.
     
    SelectCardFromTopListMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting a card draw from the top market row.
     
    SelectExtraCardMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting an extra card draw.
     
    SkipExtraDrawMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates a message indicating the player declines the extra draw.

    Player(PlayerDTO playerDTO)

    Method

    Description

    ServerVirtualView.forceInitialPlayersSync(List<PlayerDTO> allPlayers)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PlayerDTO>
    GameDTO.getWinners()
    Returns the ordered list of winners once the game ends.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GameDTO.setWinners(List<PlayerDTO> winners)

  • Uses of PlayerDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Adds a player to the existing Mesos lobby and registers their RMI stub.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Creates a new Mesos game lobby hosted by the given player.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Allows a player to rejoin a game that is being loaded, after the first player has invoked ServerNetworkHandler.loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface).
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.loadGame(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Starts loading a saved game from disk.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.ping(PlayerDTO player)
    Receives a heartbeat ping from a client and resets that player's missed-ping counter.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position)
    Places the player's totem on the offer tile at the given board position during the placing phase.
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.playerAdded(PlayerDTO playerAdded)
    Notifies the client that a new player has joined the lobby.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Signals that the player voluntarily skips their draw action for this turn, without selecting any card from the market.
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.playerToPlaceChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Notifies the client which player must place their totem next.
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.playerToPlayChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Notifies the client which player must resolve their offer-tile actions next.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the previous-round (bottom) market row during the resolve-action phase.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the current-round (top) market row during the resolve-action phase.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects the bonus card granted by the draw-one-more mechanic (triggered after the server calls askExtraDraw on the client).
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player)
    Called when the player declines the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI with type arguments of type PlayerDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.gameWinners(List<PlayerDTO> playerDTOSWinner)
    Sends the list of winners when the game ends.
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.orderOnDefaultTile(List<PlayerDTO> orderOnDefaultTile)
    Notifies the client of the updated player order on the default tiles.
